Taking on this new position, Alex will spearhead efforts to enhance performance, uphold high standards, and pursue strategic expansion within CECO Pipeline.

Novartis gains FDA approval for Fabhalta®, first treatment for C3G. Phase III study shows proteinuria reduction at one year.
news.summary: A recent Phase III study revealed that Fabhalta, the lone oral alternative complement pathway inhibitor, demonstrated a consistent reduction in proteinuria over one year with a positive safety profile. C3G, an extremely rare kidney disease mainly impacting young adults, is targeted by Fabhalta as it addresses the root cause of the condition. dieses.

news.headline: Vortex Energy Corp. plans a share consolidation: 10 pre-consolidation shares to 1 post-consolidation share.
news.summary: Vancouver-based Vortex Energy Corp. has revealed plans for a consolidation of their common shares. The proposed consolidation would merge ten pre-consolidation common shares into one post-consolidation common share. This move is aimed at streamlining the company's shares and enhancing their value. Vortex Energy Corp. is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE) under the ticker symbol VRTX, as well as on the OTC markets under VTECF and the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under AA3. This consolidation marks a significant strategy shift for the company in 2025.

news.headline: Falabella announces tender results for 3.750% Notes due 2027. Company offered to purchase all outstanding notes for cash.
news.summary: Chilean retail giant Falabella S.A. revealed the outcomes of its cash tender offer for its 3.750% Notes due 2027. The company announced its move to acquire any and all outstanding Notes through the Offer. The Offer was officially disclosed on March 20, 2025, based in Santiago.

news.headline: Global Charging as a Service Market to grow to $2,135.0 million by 2035 at CAGR of 29.1%, influenced by EV adoption and government policies.
news.summary: The Charging as a Service Market is predicted to grow significantly, from USD 165.9 million in 2025 to USD 2,135.0 million in 2035, with a 29.1% CAGR, driven by factors like EV adoption, government policies, and technology advancements. Government regulations, subsidies, and infrastructure investments contribute to market growth, and private companies aid in developing charging networks. Energy prices and grid capacity influence charging service costs, while urban areas with limited parking rely more on public and workplace charging. Key findings include the fastest growth in the DC charger segment, shared apartments leading semi-public charging, and Asia Pacific being the largest market. Auto-dealerships and OEM operated charging spaces are significant in semi-public setups, while OEM collaborations with Charge Point Operators are enhancing EV infrastructure. Major OEMs have formed partnerships to improve charging access, such as building a high-power charging network in North America and securing access to Tesla's NACS Supercharger network for their EVs.

news.summary: Salt Lake City-based AllenComm, a prominent provider of impactful learning solutions, has been recognized by eLearning Industry as one of the top companies specializing in eLearning gamification for the year 2025. news.headline: HealthMark Group named a Top Workplace in 2025 by USA Today for exceptional employee satisfaction.
news.summary: HealthMark Group has been named a Top Workplace for the year 2025 by USA Today, in recognition of its outstanding employee satisfaction efforts. The company, headquartered in Dallas, celebrated this achievement on March 20th. This prestigious honor showcases companies across the United States that prioritize providing a positive work environment. The recognition highlights HealthMark Group's commitment to employee well-being and reflects its dedication to fostering a happy and engaged workforce.

news.headline: Novartis secures 3rd FDA approval for Fabhalta in C3G, a first treatment in 100-character summary.
news.summary: Novartis has been granted its third FDA approval for the oral medication Fabhalta® (iptacopan), making it the initial and solitary treatment authorized for C3 glomerulopathy (C3G).

news.headline: Verde reports Q4 and FY 2024 results. All figures in CAD. Exchange rate: C$1 = R$3.93.
news.summary: In the fiscal year 2024, the average exchange rate was C$1.00 equaling R$3.93. This information does not pertain to Canadian dollars in specific, and it is a general figure to note the exchange rate between the Canadian dollar and the Brazilian Real in that year.

news.headline: Clearview Resources Ltd. increased proved developed producing net asset value by 51% to $3.88 in 2024, with a net debt improvement of $9 million, resulting in a net surplus of $5.2 million, including $6.4 million in cash. Natural gas price was lowest in 20 years. Reserves at December 31, 2024, include 3,290 Mbbl of light & medium crude oil, 24,974 MMcf of natural gas, and 1,612 Mbbl of natural gas liquids for a total of 9,065 Mboe. Net present values of future net revenue at 10% before income tax for developed producing reserves range from $1.9-$17.6 MM$. More details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Calgary-based Clearview Resources Ltd. saw a 51% increase in its proved developed producing net asset value per basic share in 2024 compared to the prior year, reaching $3.88 per share - the highest in a decade. This growth came despite enduring the lowest natural gas price in over 20 years. The company increased its proved developed producing crude oil reserves by 8%, primarily through an acquisition. Clearview improved its financial position by over $9 million through strategic dispositions, ending 2024 with a net surplus of $5.2 million. The company's reserves information at year-end 2024, evaluated by McDaniel & Associates Consultants Ltd., showed total proved developed producing reserves of 9,065 Mboe and a total proved + probable reserves of 16,649 Mboe. The estimated future net revenue associated with Clearview's reserves was summarized in a table with values before and after income taxes and at various discount rates. Full reserves data disclosure will be provided in Clearview's Annual Information Form to be filed by April 30, 2025.

news.headline: If Skadeförsäkring implements Guidewire InsuranceSuite on GW Cloud Platform to enhance automotive business, adapting to market demands.
news.summary: In Denmark, Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) revealed that If Skadeförsäkring (If), the primary property and casualty insurer in the Nordic area, has effectively completed its initial business release on Guidewire InsuranceSuite through Guidewire Cloud Platform (GWCP). The introduction of this new platform is set to improve If's automotive business with partners, furnishing a modern system that can easily adjust to evolving market needs. If is in the process of implementing these upgrades to enhance their operations.

news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Washington, the Presidents of the American Postal Workers Union, National Association of Letter Carriers, and National Rural Letter Carriers' Association, Mark Dimondstein, Brian Renfroe, and Donald Maston respectively, will address the media at the National Press Club Headliners. This event is expected to draw significant attention due to the prominence of the speakers and the importance of the postal service industry.

Smi emphasized the significance of this achievement and the values that drive their business.

In addition, the report shows that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, exceeding expectations and indicating a strong recovery. T-Mobile sells 800 MHz spectrum to Grain Management, focused on digital infrastructure, for global broadband.
news.summary: T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) has recently revealed plans to sell its 800 MHz spectrum portfolio to Grain Management, LLC, a prominent private investment firm specializing in digital infrastructure. The agreement is in principle, and the deal aims to facilitate the transition with the help of Black & Veatch, known for their expertise in energy and infrastructure. Grain Management is set to handle the marketing of the 800 MHz spectrum portfolio to various entities including utilities and other critical infrastructure providers.

news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Great Falls, Montana, Ash Creek Renewables, a company focused on creating renewable fuel feedstock solutions and part of Tailwater Capital LLC, revealed it has obtained exclusive licensing rights. This development marks a significant step for Ash Creek as it continues to expand its portfolio under Tailwater's ownership.

RedCloud Holdings priced initial public offering at $4.50 per share, offered 4,444,445 shares for approx $20 million.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, RedCloud Holdings plc disclosed the pricing of its initial public offering, involving 4,444,445 ordinary shares priced at $4.50 each, totaling about $20 million in gross proceeds. The underwriters have the option to acquire an additional 666,666 shares within 30 days to cover over-allotments. The Offering is set to conclude on March 24, 2025, pending standard closing conditions.

news.headline: Google's latest AI, Gemini 2.0 Flash, revolutionizes photo editing using text commands, changing image manipulation.
news.summary: Gemini 2.0 Flash by Google introduces advanced photo editing capabilities to the realm of AI chatbots. This innovative technology is set to revolutionize the way images are transformed, potentially impacting the editing process significantly.

Standard Motor Products announces expansion of Standard® Gasoline Fuel Injector program with 100% new injectors.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Standard Motor Products, Inc. announced the enhancement of its Standard® Gasoline Fuel Injector line. These fuel injectors, which are exclusively new and not remanufactured, ensure that OE-comparable spray patterns and flow rates are maintained. The expansion of this program signifies a significant advancement for SMP in providing top-quality automotive components to consumers.

NJGOP Summit highlights GOP resurgence in NJ with guest speakers, 2025 Gov. candidates Bramnick, Ciattarelli, Durr, Kranjac, educational sessions. Networking events at Caesars AC.
news.summary: Notable speakers Vivek Ramaswamy and Trump pollster Jim McLaughlin will be addressing the audience at the upcoming 2025 Governor Candidates event. Prominent candidates Bramnick, Ciattarelli, Durr, and Kranjac will also be in attendance. The event will feature educational training sessions tailored for candidates, volunteers, and political operatives. Attendees can also partake in networking opportunities and social events on Friday and Saturday at Caesars Atlantic City.

news.headline: US FDA approves TREMFYA® for Crohn's disease, offering subcutaneous and intravenous options. Demonstrated clinical remission and endoscopic response at one year, supported by GALAXI study. TREMFYA® shows superiority versus STELARA® in all endoscopic endpoints.
news.summary: TREMFYA® is the sole IL-23 inhibitor that has shown clinical remission and endoscopic response at the one-year mark through a fully subcutaneous induction regimen. Backed by findings from the GALAXI study, TREMFYA® stands out as the singular IL-23 inhibitor to exhibit superiority compared to STELARA® across all combined endoscopic endpoints, with significant data supporting its efficacy.
